name: A wolfish change
description:
Hi I made another bot, for this one you have to navigate the world as you slowly transform into a wolf, it can't be cured but it can be slowed, I recommend you use a human persona, if you want I suppose you could steer towards being a feral wolf rather than an anthro wolf, but either way you'll need to keep it hidden, good luck

I'm curious about what you guys do and how that goes so if you wanna make a few chats public go tight ahead
creator: Username 1245
